shortDesc.zh: 基于GitHub Pages的学术博客，支持Markdown渲染与双语切换
shortDesc.en: GitHub Pages academic blog with Markdown rendering & bilingual support

description.zh: 个人学术博客网站，使用纯HTML/CSS/JS构建。支持中英双语切换、Markdown文件渲染、课程笔记管理和项目展示。
description.en: Personal academic blog built with pure HTML/CSS/JS. Features bilingual switching, Markdown rendering, course note management, and project showcase.

shortDesc.zh: 基于PyTorch的图像分类实验项目
shortDesc.en: Image classification lab project based on PyTorch

description.zh: 使用PyTorch实现多种图像分类模型（ResNet、ViT等），在CIFAR-100和自定义数据集上进行训练和评估，对比不同模型架构的性能。
description.en: Implementing various image classification models (ResNet, ViT, etc.) with PyTorch, training and evaluating on CIFAR-100 and custom datasets, comparing performance across architectures.
